title: Mundaka Upanishad I: Two Knowledges
description: From the Mundaka Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Mundaka Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: There are two kinds of knowledge to be known: the higher and the lower. The lower is the four Vedas, grammar, etymology, meter, astronomy. The higher is that by which the Imperishable is known.
